stemHtml: Aircraft A and Aircraft B are climbing in a standard atmosphere with the same pitch angle. Aircraft A climbs with M0.75 and Aircraft B with M0.73. Disregarding compressibility effects, which of the following statements is correct?

options.a: Aircraft A has a better rate of climb than B.
options.b: Aircraft B has a better rate of climb than A.
options.c: Aircraft A and B have the same rate of climb.
